title: Configure Edge-TTS Male Voice
context: The user reported that the default agent was still speaking with a female voice. Upon review, the edge-tts provider was configured to use the female voice 'en-US-AriaNeural'.
decision: Configure 'en-US-BrianNeural' as the default Edge-TTS voice across all configurations (default/config.yaml and profile config.yaml files) to ensure a male voice is used.
consequences: The default bot and any fallback edge-tts configurations will now output voice using the male Brian voice.
